title: Not Enough Hats
description: [OPTIFINE/CIT] Allows you to turn pumpkins into different headwear
body:
![Not Enough Hats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KK8cvFRP/images/30cf8f884ae8a366b58c26cd41700f3bcbd5baf9.png) ## Optifine or CIT Resewn is REQUIRED for this pack to work - Note about [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn): Please use versions 1.1.5 or lower. Resourcepack will not work otherwise, and because author abandoned the mod, there likely will be no future updates where this will be fixed. - For emissive texture use [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/versions) (might conflict with Sodium) ## Not Enough Hats Change carved pumpkin's model to custom simply by renaming it on anvil.
Renaming list

Carved pumpkin:

- Claret hat - Decorated hat - Ender hat (has emissive details) - Gray hat - Inventor's hat - Regular hat - Straw hat - Top hat
![Hat renaming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7642e956ad8226fba62a3ad55a00643d71576bc.gif)
